sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109506" key="u(pofile/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποφῐλέω</orth>, <sense id="n109506.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">kiss slily,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀλλήλους</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4000.tlg001:1:25" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristaenet.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.25</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
